signals.headline: Solana Benefits from Confirmed Technical Breakout and Enterprise Adoption | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Solana Benefits from Confirmed Technical Breakout and Enterprise Adoption | YES | MED**  
Solana gained 6.65% to $84.47 on a "confirmed technical breakout above key resistance," strong ecosystem activity, and enterprise moves like Mastercard/Western Union integration for global financial infrastructure.[1][6]

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Inflows, Outpacing Bitcoin and Solana; Boosted by Evernorth SPAC Merger Progress and U
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Inflows, Outpacing Bitcoin and Solana; Boosted by Evernorth SPAC Merger Progress and U.S.-Iran Ceasefire | YES | HIGH**  
XRP saw $119.6 million in inflows last week (ending ~April 8, 2026), the highest among digital assets and its strongest since mid-December 2025, driving year-to-date inflows to $159 million (7% of AUM); this unseated Bitcoin ($107.3M) and Solana ($34.9M).[1]

signals.headline: Key context:** March 2026 inflation reached 2
signals.raw: Key context:** March 2026 inflation reached 2.2%, up from 2.0% in February, driven largely by elevated global oil prices that have pressured both prices and the Korean won (trading around 1,520 won per U.S. dollar).[2][5] Experts note that rising oil prices and currency weakness continue to increase economic uncertainty, offsetting any dovish signals from moderating headline inflation earlier in t
